text.title: Agentic RAG Tool-Using — Output Contract
text.summary: JSON shape every tool-using RAG agent emits: final answer + full call trace + budget counters. Used by validate-agentic-rag-tool-using.py for the pre-commit gate.

antipattern.description: Result summaries longer than 200 chars (full document text in the trace).
antipattern.reason: Inflates selector prompt size on next iteration and can exceed context window.
Loop cap violation — agent ran past its budget.
Wrapper bypassed the allow-list — security regression.

example.note: Invalid: result_summary exceeds 200 chars; calls_used > max_calls; allow-list violation present.

list.item: trace has at least 1 entry, each summary ≤200 chars.
routing_model is a cheap model; synthesis_model is a heavier one.
